payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a dark navy-blue pillow showing a rounded top edge and smooth, slightly shiny synthetic fabric; the crop is edge-cut and mildly blurred/low-resolution, and the object appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5–0.8 m).
